# @fluenti/vue

> Vue 3 compile-time i18n integration with v-t directive, components, and useI18n() composable.

@fluenti/vue provides internationalization for Vue 3 applications. The v-t directive is compiled away at build time by @fluenti/vite-plugin. The plugin is SSR-safe with no singletons.

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @fluenti/core @fluenti/vue @fluenti/vite-plugin
```

## Quick Start

```ts
import { createFluentVue } from '@fluenti/vue'

const fluent = createFluentVue({
  locale: 'en',
  fallbackLocale: 'en',
  messages: { en, ja },
})

app.use(fluent)
```

## Exports

- `createFluentVue(options)` — Plugin factory (SSR-safe, one instance per request)
- `useI18n()` — Composable returning the i18n context
- `FLUENTI_KEY` — Vue injection key
- `Trans` — Rich text translation component
- `Plural` — Plural forms component
- `Select` — Gender/option selection component

## Plugin Options

| Option | Type | Default | Description |
|--------|------|---------|-------------|
| `locale` | `string` | — | Active locale (required) |
| `messages` | `Record<string, Messages>` | — | Message catalogs (required) |
| `fallbackLocale` | `string` | — | Fallback when key is missing |
| `fallbackChain` | `Record<string, string[]>` | — | Locale-specific fallback chains |
| `dateFormats` | `Record<string, DateTimeFormatOptions>` | — | Named date format presets |
| `numberFormats` | `Record<string, NumberFormatOptions>` | — | Named number format presets |
| `missing` | `(locale, id) => string \| undefined` | — | Missing key handler |
| `componentPrefix` | `string` | `''` | Prefix for registered components |
| `splitting` | `boolean` | `false` | Enable async code-splitting |
| `chunkLoader` | `(locale) => Promise<Messages>` | — | Async locale chunk loader |

## useI18n() API

| Method | Signature | Description |
|--------|-----------|-------------|
| `t` | `(id, values?) => string` | Translate a key |
| `d` | `(value, style?) => string` | Format a date |
| `n` | `(value, style?) => string` | Format a number |
| `format` | `(message, values?) => string` | Format ICU message directly |
| `te` | `(key, locale?) => boolean` | Check if key exists |
| `tm` | `(key, locale?) => CompiledMessage` | Get raw compiled message |
| `locale` | `Ref<string>` | Reactive current locale |
| `setLocale` | `(locale) => Promise<void>` | Change locale |
| `loadMessages` | `(locale, messages) => void` | Add messages at runtime |
| `getLocales` | `() => string[]` | Get loaded locale codes |
| `preloadLocale` | `(locale) => void` | Preload a locale chunk |
| `isLoading` | `Ref<boolean>` | Whether a chunk is loading |
| `loadedLocales` | `Ref<ReadonlySet<string>>` | Set of loaded locales |

## v-t Directive Modifiers

| Modifier | Effect |
|----------|--------|
| _(none)_ | Translates text content |
| `.plural` | Plural forms with pipe syntax |
| `.alt` | Translates alt attribute |
| `.placeholder` | Translates placeholder attribute |
| `.title` | Translates title attribute |
| `.{attr}` | Translates any named attribute |

## Documentation

- Full docs: https://fluenti.dev
- llms-full.txt: Detailed API reference with examples
- Source: https://github.com/usefluenti/fluenti
